name: Dual-node B200 (8x B200)
description: Two homogeneous nodes, each with 4 NVIDIA B200 GPUs (8 GPUs total). All devices are connected point-to-point over the scale-up network; GPUs within a node also share an in-node CXL link to the (optional) node memory. A single datacenter NVM pool is the input device that holds all model weights at init.

network.notes: ESTIMATE - scale-up modeled point-to-point (no congestion/topology): ~1.8 TB/s NVLink-class link at ~1 us; in-node CXL ~64 GB/s (PCIe5 x16-class) at ~300 ns. Tune to the fabric you want to model.
